positive: A dramatic cyberpunk street scene at night. Rain-slicked neon signs reflecting off wet asphalt, flying vehicles, and towering futuristic skyscrapers. High contrast, deep shadows, cinematic, moody, dystopian aesthetic, volumetric lighting, Blade Runner style.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, sunlight, pastoral elements, soft edges, watercolor
